rationale: In the citing paper, Briesch, Chintagunta, and Fox (2009) appears as part of a grouped citation when the authors note they include standard control variables in their choice model. The paper does not single out this study's assortment framework or findings for hypothesis development, mechanism explanation, or interpretation of results. Given this limited, list-style use, the citation functions as background methodological/literature context rather than a meaningful building block of the focal contribution.
